name: KeyIcon
description: Reusable circular icon container. 9 colors x 5 sizes (64/56/48/40/32) x 2 styles (stroke = white bordered surface, lighter = tinted surface).
sourceNote: The Figma component set generated ~90 near-identical hardcoded variants (9 colors x 5 sizes x 2 styles, one branch per combination); implemented generically here via CSS data attributes instead. This same visual pattern already appeared inline (uncomponentized) as DrawerHeader's Left-Icon Large leading slot and ContentLabel/ContentCard's Left-Icon type — new usages should reach for this shared component instead of re-inlining the pattern.
